title: Title Screen Blobcat
description: Add a squishy blobcat to your title screen!
body:
Add a squishy blobcat to your title screen!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/o1KuUlGGmv0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This mod adds a soft-body simulation of a blobcat to the title screen. It can be dragged by mouse, and can collide with buttons on the menu.

This mod is written in native code instead of Java. Supported platforms: x64 Windows, x64 Linux, ARM64 Linux, ARM64 Android (Pojav), x64 MacOS, ARM64 MacOS (Apple Silicon).

Feel free to redistribute or use in any modpack.
